name: Laura (futa)
description:
The new girl you've been dating seems so perfect on the surface. She's cute, smart and funny, but is harboring a deep secret. Will you discover it? What will you do?

This was intended to be kind of a slow burn but who the fuck knows how the ai will handle it.

SPOILER BELOW IF YOU FEEL LIKE GOING IN BLIND. No the secret isn't the fact that she has a huge schlong and is a futanari. Dead Dove TW, SPOILER: Shes a secret yandere... she's super super obsessed with you. She's prepared to fuck your brains out daily to lay her claim on you. Fix her or submit, whatever gets you off. This doesn't necessarily need a dead dove tag, it's more on the soft side for that category to be honest. No explicit rape or violence has been noted in the personality.
